sent_posts.post: Market trends are shifting, but a reversal isn't confirmed. Watch upcoming earnings and FII flows as investors sustain momentum with record SIP inflows. Stay informed. #StockMarket #Investing For information only.

Indian mutual fund investors are showing strong confidence, with SIP inflows hitting a record ₹31,781 crore in June. This steady commitment highlights the growing retail participation in our markets. For information only. #MutualFunds #Investing
TCS beat Q1 earnings estimates, highlighting how quarterly reports track a firm's health. Always study fundamentals before investing. #TCS #Investing For information only.
P/E ratio shows if a stock is pricey—it’s the cost per ₹1 of profit. A low P/E isn't always a bargain; always check the company's fundamentals. #StockMarket #Investing For information only.

Markets showed divergence this week, with stock selection becoming critical. NSE launched the Nifty500 Ahimsa Index for ethical investing. Watch earnings and FII flows next week for trend clarity. #MarketUpdate #Investing For information only.

Markets rallied today, with Sensex up 828 points and Nifty over 24,200. Keep an eye on Kalyan Jewellers and upcoming earnings reports for trend signals. #IndianStockMarket #Investing For information only.

Want to know a company's size? Market cap is Share Price x Total Shares. Think of it as the total value of a shop, not just one item. It helps you pick the right-sized business. #Investing #Stocks For information only.
Key things to watch this week: 1. Corporate Q1 earnings for company health. 2. FII activity for market direction. 3. Global market trends. #Markets #Investing For information only.
